description: Medical prescription in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Probably 12th or 13th century based on handwriting. Partial transcription on Goitein's index card. On recto there is a poem on the history of the Patriarchs in rhymed Judaeo-Arabic (Goitein wonders: "a haggada for women?")
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
